_comment: Saved render.onDeploy event for the Lazarus Canvas. Use this as the payload for a Manual Run (component: start) so the Canvas can be demoed without a live Render webhook. The outer object is the SuperPlane envelope; the real Render fields live under .data — so expressions use root().data.deployId etc.
_comment_assumption: // ASSUMPTION — verify against docs: field names (deployId, serviceId, status) are confirmed in docs.superplane.com/components/render, but the exact `status` string for a failed/unhealthy deploy is a best guess. Confirm with `superplane index triggers --name render.onDeploy --output json` and a real webhook payload, then adjust the gate expression in canvas.yaml.
